title: Arcuisine 35 x 24 cm Oval Borosilicate Glass Roaster
features: Stain resistant and does not retain flavours;
Made of borosilicate glass giving high thermal shock resistance;
Ovenproof and freezer, dishwasher and microwave safe;
Reliable quality, withstand heat from -40 degrees C up to +300 degrees C
description: Product Description Arcuisine Oval Roaster is made of borosilicate glass. Glass is a great hygienic material that makes it ideal for healthy cooking and eating. Reliable quality roster that withstand heat from -40 degrees C up to +300 degrees C. The Arcuisine range can sustain high thermal and mechanical shocks. Arcuisine range offers consumers reliable cookware products at competitive prices for a European cookware brand. The brand is well known in the trade and is associated with trustworthy and functional products. The Roster has 5 year guarantee against manufacturer defects. It measures 35 cm length by 24 cm width. Box Contains 1 x Oval Roaster
